'''Shabell''' was a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] tried to take a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] into [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s war room, she detected and deactivated the device using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
